action.reasoning: Observation: best exploration_score=0.6068 (success_rate=0.8733, travel=337.9m on full 150-map test; rooms at 0.8 success). Local proxy ~0.85 on 9 maps. Recent runs succeeded on full eval when predict.py not truncated. Analysis: dijkstra-based global target selection with (utility**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) + next-hop neighbor stepping is strong standard 0-param frontier planner (fully compatible with real cogniplan_env.ExplorationEnv, uses provided node utilities/graph/neighbors, respects all constraints and eval contract). Slight param change to alpha=2.8/beta=1.0 increases distance penalty (should reduce avg successful travel_distance for higher score while retaining high success). Root cause of past 0.0/proxy-only was workspace truncation of long predict.py; new version is compact+complete (no cutoff risk). Decision: overwrite with FULL compact non-truncated predict.py (proven select_waypoint, robust get_maps with eval_config.json priority then maps_eval glob then 3-per-type proxy from maps_train, full run_evaluation with per-ep try/except, strict per_type for all keys, success-only distances, exact JSON contract + correct exploration_score=(1/N)sum(S_i*300.0/d_i)). Update train.py with new params+v25 desc. Run train+local proxy validation then submit_eval for official full test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
